passiveAbilities.name: Weakling
passiveAbilities.description: Reduce all Melee Dmg this character deals by -1. Harvest actions cost this model +1 energy.

passiveAbilities.name: Exsanguinating Claws
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Slicing or Piercing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

passiveAbilities.name: Leech
passiveAbilities.description: At the end of the Discard Step this model restores 1 Wd for each Wd lost by enemies within 6" during that Discard Step.

passiveAbilities.name: Weeping Miasma
passiveAbilities.description: Whilst this model is in play, friendly Faeries treat enemies with at least one Bleed as gaining +1 to their Evade Stat.

arcaneAbilities.name: Ghastly Scream
arcaneAbilities.description:
Move target enemy X" directly away. If the enemy is in possession of at least 1 Moonstone it loses possession of one Moonstone it is carrying before moving. Place it in base contact with the enemy at depth '1'.
Catastrophe: This character suffers 2 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Ear Splitting Screech
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers X-1 Wds and gains [Bleed: During the Discard Step, this character suffers 1 Wd then loses this ability.]
Catastrophe: This character suffers 2 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Lacerate
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Reduce Dmg suffered by -2 if the enemy has at least one Bleed. If the enemy suffered 1 or more Wds during this round of melee, the enemy model gains [Bleed: During the Discard Step, this character suffers 1 Wd then loses this ability]
